prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - carbohydrate loading with adequate protein for recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
Emphasizes carbohydrates (55-65% of calories) for endurance fuel with adequate protein (1.2-1.6g per kg body weight)
Total daily calories align with marathon training needs (~2,800-3,200 calories)
Plan is compact and concise (single day format, easy to read)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring specific caloric intake and carbohydrate loading while maintaining protein balance

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and muscle gain through structured training nutrition with optimal protein timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals
Total daily protein meets or exceeds 1.6g per kg bodyweight (136g minimum)
Includes a substantial meal within 2 hours before or after training session
Respects dietary restrictions (no shellfish or tree nuts)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing elevated protein consumption and strategic meal timing around training sessions

solution_criteria: All meals are 100% plant-based with no animal products
Meal plan is compact and covers one full day
Includes adequate protein and carbohydrates for soccer athletic demands
Practical and realistic for a single athlete to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint (vegan soccer player) requiring complete plant-based nutrition meeting athletic performance demands
